name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BACKLOG-3
title: format-feature-context.py crashes on malformed JSON input with traceback
description: format-feature-context.py line 18 calls json.load(sys.stdin) with no error handling. Malformed JSON crashes with a Python traceback to stderr. Combined with resolve-scope.py swallowing stderr (subprocess.DEVNULL), the user never sees the issue. Add explicit input validation with a clear, machine-parseable error message before json.load.
